end local function c(c)return M[c+(615062+-593614)]end do local c=table.insert local S=math.floor local b=string.char local Z=M local L=string.len local R=string.sub local U=type local y=table.concat for M=-292301+292302,#Z,693665-693664 do local i=Z[M]if U(i)=="\115\116\114\105\110\103"then local U=L(i)local X={}local a=216434-216433 local c(X,b(S(F/(-895161-(-960697)))))if a>=U or R(i,a+(-1018971-(-1018972)),a+(-902120+902121))~="\061"then c(X,b(S((F%(957757-892221))/(-595809+596065))))end break end a=a+(-915903+915904)end Z[M]=y(X)end end end return(function(M,b,Z,L,W,R,U,y,x,s,q,X,F,i,j,O,S,A,G,a,C,P)G,j,P,S,A,i,X,x,C,s,q,F,y,O,a=function(M,c)local b=F(c)local Z=function(Z,L,W)return S(M,{Z;L,W},c,b)end return Z end,function(M)local c,S=-829765+829766,M[-566688+566689]while S do i[S],c=i[S]-(-812427+812428),c+(-789551+789552)if 178901+-178901==i[S]then i[S],y[S]=nil,nil end S=M[c]end end,function(M,c)local b=F(c)local Z=function(Z,L,W,R,U)return S(M,{Z;L,W,R;U},c,b)end return Z end,function(S,Z,L,W)local end,185168-185168 return(q(89600+15006496,{}))(b(U))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[c(-355958+334642)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
